local_divergence.ahead_subject: chore(snapshot): preserve ResilienceKit local dirty state 2026-06-07

findings.issue: go.work references 4 modules that do not exist in the repo (./pheno-retry, ./pheno-circuitbreaker, ./pheno-bulkhead, ./pheno-timeout). go/ contains only go.work; no go.mod files exist. go build ./... is broken.
findings.fix: Remove the 4 stale `use` entries; or land the matching Go modules under go/.

findings.issue: Uses trufflehog/actions/setup@f15cb8b37b9b70056bc82a8eb7151f75fad27a71. The trufflehog/actions repo 404s upstream (deleted). The org-canonical is trufflesecurity/trufflehog@75add79b929b263dae147d2e5bcf0daf292165cf.
findings.fix: Replace path+SHA with trufflesecurity/trufflehog@75add79b929b263dae147d2e5bcf0daf292165cf and migrate the `with:` block to path/base/head/extra_args.

findings.issue: Local main is 1 commit ahead of origin/main (e83f5f0, snapshot). Snapshot improves workflow hygiene (workflow_dispatch, permissions, SHA pins) but the trufflehog rot it claims to fix is still present. CodeQL duplicate permissions: keys introduced. SHA drift from org-canonical (df4cb1c vs 34e114876).
findings.fix: Re-do the snapshot: fix trufflehog path, de-duplicate codeql.yml permissions, align SHA to 34e114876, push as PR.

findings.issue: 19 diverged local branches; 7 are 50+ commits behind main (vestigial snapshot-era branches). No open PRs tied to them.
findings.fix: Bulk-delete branches with ahead>0 && behind>50 && no open PR. Keep chore/worklog-seed-ResilienceKit, chore/workflow-hygiene-ubuntu-24, fix/async-traits-rand010-resolved for now.

findings.issue: Only extends config:base. No cargo, regex, or pep621 managers. With Rust workspace + 3 uv.lock files, Renovate cannot track these ecosystems.
findings.fix: Add cargo (rust/Cargo.toml), regex (deny.toml), and pep621 (pyproject.toml) matchManagers.

findings.issue: CODEOWNERS only at .github/CODEOWNERS; root /CODEOWNERS missing. Org-canonical pattern is /CODEOWNERS at root.
findings.fix: Copy .github/CODEOWNERS to /CODEOWNERS (or symlink) to match org-canonical.

findings.issue: Header present but [Unreleased] is empty. No entries since org-bootstrap (2026-04-30).
findings.fix: Add Unreleased entries for the 1 ahead commit and any pending PRs.

findings.issue: actions/checkout SHA comment says # v4 in one step, # v4.1.1 in the original (now overwritten to # v4). Cosmetic drift, low impact.
